The '''Charis Fleet''' was the largest [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|naval formation]] stationed in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the Charis [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] was part of the [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] commanded by the Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]. During this [[Time/Legends|time]], the fleet was stationed at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Charis]] and was under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pertaal Logris]].

==History==
The Charis [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] was the main [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet formation]] operating in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TDC" /> By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date">The events of ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' take place four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the Charis Fleet was part of the [[Moff Sarne's forces|military forces]] serving [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], ruler of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Sarne had quietly withdrawn the Kathol sector from [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Imperial authority]]—a move that had been made easy by the fracturing of the Imperial command structure and subsequent in-fighting between various factions—and had declared himself a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]].<ref name="TDC" />

During this [[Time/Legends|time]], the fleet was commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pertaal Logris]] and was stationed at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Charis]]. When Moff Sarne was [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|ousted]] from his [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as part of their [[DarkStryder Campaign|military campaign]] against him, he subsequently fled into the depths of the Kathol sector. The Moff ordered that the Charis Fleet was to be split up into smaller formations so that it could handle multiple missions aimed at harassing the New Republic's attempts to establish [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] and military alliances in the region as they attempted to expand their sphere of influence.<ref name="TDC" />

==Organization==
The Charis Fleet was comprised of two [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigates]], two [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruisers]], four [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]], two Kuat Drive Yards [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carriers]], and multiple [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s and [[Patrol ship/Legends|system patrol craft]]. The Fleet was commanded by Admiral Pertaal Logris, a staunch supporter of Moff Sarne and his regime.<ref name="TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Charis Fleet was mentioned in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', an [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]] as background information regarding the disposition of Imperial forces in the sector.<ref name="TDC" />
